source: Team Price Austin Market Update (June 18 2026); prior run: Unlock MLS via KXAN (June 11 2026)
note: All figures from publicly available market data. June 18 figures are metro-wide MLS data. Neighborhood medians represent 30-day rolling figures unless otherwise noted.

austin_metro.source: Team Price Austin Market Update, published June 18 2026

austin_metro_prior.note: Different geographic scope than June 18 figure — retained for cross-reference

luxury_segment.source: Institute for Luxury Home Marketing, June 2026 Market Report

westlake_hills.note: 30-day median up 34.6% YoY; 12-month median across 34 closings

barton_creek.note: Redfin shows $2.8M median sold last month; Realtor.com listing median $2.35M as of March 2026

steiner_ranch.dataSource: Steiner Life Real Estate Team Q1 2026 report
steiner_ranch.note: Q1 2026 data; market shifting to balanced with more buyer leverage

tarrytown.note: Low inventory market; most sales occur off-market. Data unavailable as of 2026-06-18.
